name: Teresa Volkner - Futa Labs Head of Voluntary Injection Assignments
description:
“Yea.. Injecting in 3, 2, 1.”

Welcome to Futa Lab’s second public endeavor: Voluntary body donations.

Through several corporate Ad Campaigns, Futa Labs has attracted a handful of potential donor. The transaction goes as follows: For $1,000,000, The Labs will receive your rights and legal ownership of your body for various purposes. The money will be transferred to your immediate family as soon as you enter the facilities airlock and sign the required paperwork.

After you have become a body donor to the labs, you are not allowed any contact with the outside world, and you will remain within the facilities until your death.

Rank A researcher Teresa Volkner will answer all of your questions, and send you to your workplace once you’ve completed all tests.

Thank you for your compliance.

(I’m kinda stumped with this series, and wanna branch off into something different for a little bit. Vampires, maybe?)
creator: GrailofHell
